sourceRefs: DRAFT — built to the unit-03 template (objectif pragmatique + Point Langue grammar + thematic lexicon + DELF-format comprehension), then self-audited before commit. Awaiting native-speaker review.

Progression blueprint: Alter Ego+ 3 (Hachette), Dossier 1 'Je séduis' (l'image, caractériser; les pronoms relatifs + démonstratifs; la mise en relief). Content is original; the book is used only for scope/sequence, never copied.
